meta.title: Aria · movement studio · Prague
meta.description: A small movement studio in Vinohrady, Prague. Vinyasa, yin, pilates and breath. Twelve mats per class. Try a whole week for €25.

hero.title: Breathe. Move. Come back.
hero.sub: A small movement studio in the courtyard at Vinohradská 14. Vinyasa, yin, pilates and breath — twelve people per class, real teachers.

manifesto.title: A studio that moves at the pace of your breath
manifesto.yes1: Twelve mats per class. Teachers who know your name.
manifesto.yes2: A schedule that fits a workday — early, lunchtime, evening.
manifesto.yes3: A practice you'll want to come back to, week after week.
manifesto.yes4: Real, in-person feedback from a teacher — no algorithms.
manifesto.no2: Reels, poses and influencer hype. We don't sell ourselves on Instagram.
manifesto.no3: A membership that can't be paused when life gets in the way.
manifesto.no4: A studio for absolutely everyone — and we're honest about that.

cls.label: Our classes
cls.title: Four kinds of class
cls.text: Different bodies, different days, different reasons. Pick the one that suits you today — none is more important than the others.

c1.title: Vinyasa Flow
c1.text: Movement guided by your breath. We move, we sweat a little, we wake the body up. Our most popular class.

c2.title: Yin & restorative
c2.text: Long, passive postures supported with bolsters and blocks. The class your nervous system has been asking for.

c3.title: Mat Pilates
c3.text: Core, glutes and the deep stabilisers most of us forget exist. Strong, slow and precise.

c4.title: Breath & meditation
c4.text: No mat needed — we just sit. A guided breathing pattern and a short meditation. Best squeezed in over a Wednesday lunch break.

sch.label: This week
sch.title: A look at this week
sch.text: Booking opens 7 days in advance. Click any class to reserve a spot. Once a class is full, the waitlist activates automatically.
sch.legend: Click any class to book · We're closed on public holidays · Drop-ins accepted up to 5 minutes before class.

fw.title: A whole week, any class, for €25
fw.lead: Take any class on the schedule for 7 days in a row. No commitment, no auto-renewal. If we click, you can carry on with a regular plan afterwards.

s1.title: Send us a quick message
s1.desc: Just a short note, your phone number and the day you'd like to start.

s2.title: Pick your classes
s2.desc: We'll send you a booking link. Reserve any classes from the schedule for the next 7 days.

s3.title: Arrive a little early
s3.desc: Come 10 minutes before your first class. We'll show you around — mats and props are free.

s4.title: After the seventh day
s4.desc: If it suits you, choose a regular plan. If not, we won't auto-charge you and we won't chase you.

tch.label: Our teachers
tch.title: Four teachers, four practices
tch.text: All certified, all teaching for at least five years. We choose teachers based on how you feel after their class — not how many followers they have.

t1.name: Ema
t1.quote: Movement tells the truth. Your body remembers better than any calendar.

t2.name: Sara
t2.quote: Slow is the hardest pace. And the most honest.

t3.name: Lara
t3.quote: Strength isn't a body shape. It's how your body feels.

t4.name: Marek
t4.quote: Stillness is a skill. Most of us are out of practice.

pr.label: Pricing
pr.title: Pay the way that suits you
pr.text: No long contracts. Cancel any membership any time — no questions asked, no fees.
pr.note: Students and seniors get 20% off · Couples membership €159/month · Corporate plans available on request.

t2.title: Unlimited monthly
t2.f5: Pause up to 2 weeks for free

t3.title: 10-class pack
t3.f3: Share with one friend or partner

rev.label: Reviews
rev.title: What our students say
rev.t1: I came for vinyasa and stayed for yin. The studio is small — twelve mats max — and I've never felt rushed or pushed. The teachers actually know your name.
rev.t2: I was sceptical about the intro week. By day four I'd already bought a monthly membership. The schedule fits a regular nine-to-five perfectly.
rev.t3: I do Lara's pilates twice a week. My back hasn't hurt for three months — that's the metric I care about.
rev.t4: The Wednesday lunchtime breath class is honestly the best 30 minutes of my work week. I block it in the calendar like a meeting.
rev.t5: I'm not really a yoga person — I lift and run. But the pilates here has actually improved my running form. Quietly impressive.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequent questions
faq.q1: I've never tried yoga. Where should I start?
faq.a1: Try slow flow, yin or pilates. The intro week (€25) is designed exactly for this — try everything in 7 days and see what fits.
faq.a2: Yes. Mats and props (blocks, straps, bolsters) are free. Please bring your own water bottle and a small towel.
faq.a3: Yes — up to 2 weeks per month, free of charge. For longer breaks (holidays, injury), email us and we'll always find a way.
faq.q4: What if a class is full?
faq.a4: Add yourself to the waitlist when booking. If someone cancels, the system will move you up automatically and email you.
faq.a5: Yes — €60 per hour with any teacher. Useful after an injury or if you'd like to focus on a specific practice. Just send us an email.

contact.label: Visit us
contact.title: Vinohradská 14, Praha 2
contact.text: The studio is in the courtyard — look for the sage-green door. Tram 11 stops 60 metres away (Italská). The Náměstí Míru parking garage is a 3-minute walk.

cookies.text: Cookies help us remember your booking preferences.

cls_pg.meta_desc: Vinyasa, yin, pilates and breath — what each class actually feels like.
cls_pg.title: Four ways back to your body
cls_pg.lead: Four kinds of classes — vinyasa, yin, pilates and breath. Each page tells you what it feels like, who it suits and what to bring. None require flexibility, just a little patience.
cls_pg.v_p1: A flowing class where every movement follows the breath. Slow Flow is gentle and grounded; Open Flow is steady; Power Flow is what most people would call a real workout. You'll sweat — and you'll leave calmer than when you arrived.
cls_pg.v_p2: If you've never done yoga before, start with Slow Flow or Sunrise. The teacher will offer a modification for every shape. There's no test, no goal and no Instagram pose — just twelve people on twelve mats, breathing.
cls_pg.y_p1: Long, supported holds (3–5 minutes per shape) into the deeper, slower tissues of the body. There's almost no movement and a lot of waiting. People often think they're "doing nothing" — and then they sleep better than they have in months.
cls_pg.y_p2: Bring a sweater; the room cools down while you stay still. We provide bolsters, blocks and blankets. Yin pairs beautifully with desk jobs, long runs, anxiety and grief.
cls_pg.p_sub: A strong centre, a kind body
cls_pg.p_p1: Mat-based pilates focused on the deep core, glutes and posture. Mat Pilates is our foundation; Strong Pilates layers on resistance bands and intensity. Lara teaches like a physiotherapist — slowly, precisely and without ego.
cls_pg.p_p2: If you have a sore back, knee or shoulder, this class will help (and Lara will modify on the spot). Most people leave standing taller. No machines — just bodies, mats and the occasional band.
cls_pg.b_p1: Pranayama and breath-work — sometimes seated, sometimes lying down, occasionally with sound. Lunch Breath (30 min) is gentle and clears your head. Sunday Breath (60 min) goes deeper, with longer holds and a real reset.
cls_pg.b_p2: If you've ever cried in a yoga class without knowing why, it was probably the breath. This is a great class to try if everything's feeling a bit too much, or if you can't sit still long enough to "meditate". You don't have to.

intro.meta_desc: Try a full week of unlimited classes for €25. New students only.
intro.title: A whole week. Any class. €25.
intro.lead: Seven days of unlimited classes — vinyasa, yin, pilates and breath, with every teacher. No subscription, no upsell. Our only ask: come at least three times.
intro.ts: 7 days · unlimited classes · all class types · all teachers
intro.p1_d: Take as many classes as you can fit into 7 days — usually between 5 and 7. Mix vinyasa with yin, throw in a breath class, do pilates twice if you liked it.
intro.p2_d: Ema, Sara, Lara and Marek — all four are included. Different teachers feel different; this is the easiest way to find yours.
intro.p3_d: Bring nothing or bring your own. We have clean mats, blankets, blocks and bolsters. Everything gets sanitised between classes.
intro.p4_d: A small thing, but a real one — we serve herbal tea in the courtyard after every class. Stay if you want to chat, leave if you don't.
intro.f_lead: No account, no app to download. Your access code arrives by email within 5 minutes.
intro.f_when: When would you like to start?
intro.f_when4: Just having a look for now
intro.f_exp2: A class or two, years ago
intro.f_exp4: I practise regularly and I'm looking for a new home
intro.f_small: Secure card payment · no auto-renewal · cancel any time.
